channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: US military kills two men in new strike on vessel in eastern Pacific
item.description: Latest attack brings death toll from US strikes on vessels in the Pacific and Caribbean to at least 170 since September.

item.title: Iran war live: Trump says Tehran wants deal as US blockade in Hormuz begins
item.description: Iran accuses US of committing piracy as thousands rally in Tehran against the blockade in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Hezbollah leader urges Lebanon’s government to pull out of Israel talks
item.description: Naim Qassem says planned talks in Washington, DC, are a ploy to pressure Hezbollah into laying down its weapons.

item.title: UN urges ‘all parties’ to respect navigation in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: UN Secretary-General is calling on ‘all parties’ to respect freedom of navigation in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Energy prices rise despite Jones Act suspension by Trump
item.description: Shipping costs have increased by more than 10 percent in the past month due to the US-Israel war on Iran.

item.title: Israel kills three Palestinians in separate Gaza strikes
item.description: Two Palestinians were killed in separate strikes in southern Gaza on Monday, according to officials at Nasser hospital.

item.title: Hezbollah rejects Lebanon’s direct negotiations with Israel
item.description: Hezbollah leader Naim Qassem has urged Lebanon to cancel a planned Washington meeting with Israeli representatives.

item.title: Trump says Iran wants ‘peace deal’ but insists on ‘no nukes’
item.description: Donald Trump says Iran wants to make a peace deal “very badly” after talks in Islamabad ended without agreement.

item.title: Lebanon enters talks with Israel but with no cards to play
item.description: The Lebanese government go into peace talks with limited influence over the group.

item.title: BBC joins paramedics on duty in Lebanon after Israeli strikes
item.description: BBC Middle East correspondent Hugo Bachega joins paramedics on duty in Nabatieh - a city that was once vibrant, but is now abandoned.
